name: USB Link Software
description: Configure and update XeRun/EZRUN/Platinum ESCs via the Hobbywing LCD Program Box / USB Link adapter.
notes: Zip contains an Inno Setup installer (asInvoker, per-user, no UAC); RC Central runs it silently into its tools dir. The installed app itself requires admin, so launching shows a UAC prompt. Download URL is versioned and will rot on the next release.

name: RS-ST PRO Servo Program
description: Setup software for the RS-ST / RS-ST PRO drift steering servo (needs the RS-PGCB/RS-PGCA USB programmer).
notes: Windows only. Portable exe - unzip and run, no installer. The download page slug and wpdmdl id change per version, so expect this URL to rot on the next release.
